title: Adult Game
congratulations: Congratulations! You really know how to live an adult life.
irresponsible: What a shame! You're irresponsible and showed that you don't know how to be an adult.
playedCongratulations: Today you've shown that you really know how be an adult somehow. Nice :D
playedIrresponsible: Today you've shown you're irresponsible. Shame on you, man...
guideRules:
You receive a random salary and a set of bills. The total of all bills always exceeds your salary — you can't pay everything... just as in real life.

Choose which bills to pay and submit your selection. There is exactly ONE correct answer each day.

If your selection matches it perfectly, you win and prove that you know how to live an adult life. If not... well, there will be another opportunity to be in debt again.

One play per day — resets at midnight (Brasília time).
